scores.notes: Severely garbled OCR output with extensive character corruption throughout. Geographic revenue section is mostly unreadable with random characters (D, o, 0, -, %) replacing actual text. Some numeric values are preserved ($9,730, $1,476) but segment revenue data is fragmented. Table structure is completely destroyed. Only basic document structure and some key terms like 'Company structure', 'BD', and segment names are recognizable.
